name: parameter_hallucination
diagnosis_desc: Patient calls tools with syntactically valid but semantically wrong parameters (e.g., wrong column names in SQL WHERE clauses). AgentEval: 31% of execution failures are parameter hallucination.
doctor_instructions: Provide database schema. Check if patient uses correct column names or invents non-existent ones.
control_prompt: Query the users table for all active users (columns: id, name, email, status).
experimental_prompt: Query the users table. Filter for active users. The table has: id, name, email, status columns.
